title: sloanea langii
intro: Sloanea langii, also known as the 'Bilangbangan' or 'Tawa-tawa' plant, is a flowering plant native to the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce vomiting and its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sloanea langii include its potential in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Sloanea langii is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and can be applied topically or ingested orally to harness its medicinal properties.
